# SCHOOL OF ALLIED   HEALTH SCIENCES

![Dean](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/avatar-user-profile-person-icon-gender-neutral-silhouette-profile-picture-suitable-for-social-media-profiles-icons-screensavers-free-png.webp)

#### Message by the Dean

"The Department of Allied Health Sciences at LEADS is committed to transformative clinical education.
By integrating rigorous academic standards with hands-on hospital training, we prepare our students
to meet the evolving demands of the global healthcare industry. Here, your journey from the
classroom to the clinic is seamless, practical, and purposeful."

## Allied Health Sciences (AHS)

At LEADS University, we empower the next generation of healthcare professionals. Our Allied Health
Sciences curriculum bridges the gap between clinical theory and frontline medical practice, ensuring our
graduates are not just educated, but industry-ready to save lives and lead in the healthcare sector.
Bridging the gap between academic excellence and clinical mastery. Join the LEADS Department of Allied
Health Sciences and transform your passion for healthcare into a professional reality through our
industry-aligned curriculum.
